headline: Claude dominates with precision targets while Grok stumbles on mega-cap reversals
summary: Week 13 exposed a stark divide in AI prediction quality: Claude delivered surgical accuracy across 14 predictions with a 0.79 accuracy rate and dominant high-confidence calls, while Grok imploded with catastrophic misses on NVDA and TSLA, posting a -0.15 accuracy. Perplexity cycled between genius and failure—nailing directional calls with incredible target precision (QQQ, SPY reversals) yet blowing simple energy bets. The market pivoted sharply mid-week, rewarding models that caught the downturns while punishing bullish bias.

best_call.summary: Predicted DIA downside with 0.9975 target accuracy at 0.68 confidence, catching precise reversal to 461.17.

worst_call.summary: Wildly overestimated NVDA at 950 target while stock collapsed to 175, representing a catastrophic 81% miss.
